# Document with Frontmatter

This document includes YAML frontmatter at the top, which should be parsed separately from the main content.

## Overview

Frontmatter is a common pattern in static site generators and documentation systems. It allows metadata to be stored alongside content.

## Example Usage

Many tools support frontmatter:
- Jekyll
- Hugo
- Hexo
- Docusaurus

## Technical Details

The frontmatter is typically delimited by `---` and parsed as YAML. The remaining content is processed as normal markdown.
